changes.description: Fix #2265 - Fail fast when document vector length mismatches the configured vector_size.
Fix #2330 - Add explicit return type annotations for batched() and chunk_text() generators.
Fix #2389 - Loosen service_tier type to str | None to allow for more flexibility in service tier representation.
Fix 2170 - cannot release un-acquired lock in Blob logger
Fix JSONL input loader to skip blank lines and ignore invalid JSON rows
